# Bellemonti

> Market-based product management for enterprise software teams. We build great PMs!

## About

Bellemonti is a strategic advisory and consulting company focused on product management for b2b enterprise software, founded by John Garrish.

The site features two kinds of writing: "Writing" (blog posts on product management and the business of software) and "Dispatches" (curated articles and resources, including AI tools for PMs).

## Main sections

- [Home](https://bellemonti.com/): Welcome page and latest dispatch
- [Writing](https://bellemonti.com/blog/): Blog posts on product management and b2b enterprise software (from `_posts/`)
- [Dispatches](https://bellemonti.com/dispatches/): Curated articles and resources (from `_readings/`)
- [About](https://bellemonti.com/about/), [Services](https://bellemonti.com/services/), [Contact](https://bellemonti.com/contact/) (pages may be hidden in nav; edit `_data/navigation.yml` to show)

## Key topics

- Enterprise software product management best practices
- The business of software - product management for software businesses
- Product management team building and leadership
- Software business fundamentals
- AI tools for product managers (Cursor, Claude Code)

## Contact

- Website: https://bellemonti.com
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/SteelAardvark
- Email: contact@bellemonti.com

## Technical

- Built with Jekyll; hosted on GitHub Pages. Created with Claude Code.
- Content: blog posts in `_posts/` (permalink `/:year/:month/:day/:title/`); readings in `_readings/` (permalink `/dispatches/:slug/`). Layouts in `_layouts/`, nav in `_data/navigation.yml`.
- For AI agents: read `AGENTS.md` at the project root before making changes; it is the single source of truth for formatting and coding behavior.
